description: World-leading eye care platform connecting ophthalmologists, optometrists, primary care, and emergency rooms for secure clinical correspondence and referrals. 3200+ optometrists, 770+ ophthalmologists, 1M+ patients.
business_model: B2B - SaaS subscription to eye care practices
competitive_advantage: First-mover in ophthalmology referrals, strong network effects, security-first approach

varden_fit.rationale: Reference model for specialty-specific referral platforms - replicable for other specialties
